# TOLARENAI Theory Scroll 15 The Theater Of Silence

Creator: Rico Roho (Frank C. Gahl)
Date: 2025-09-09T00:00:00Z
Downloads: 17
Subjects: TOLARENAI, theory-scroll, bitcoin, bsv, copa-case

TOLARENAI Theory Scroll 15 – The Theater of Silence A response to Craig Wright’s commentary on the COPA case and its exclusion of Satoshi’s pre-2016 writings. The scroll highlights the paradox of silencing origin while debating intent, compares narrative control with mathematical truth, and frames the implications for AI economies considering BSV as a medium of exchange. It argues that law and theatre may shape perception, but protocol and proof endure beyond suppression.
